heading: “Member of the House” defined
label: 5326 “Member of the House” defined
text: As used in the phrase “Member of the House” shall mean a Representative, Representative-elect, Delegate, Delegate-elect, Resident Commissioner, or Resident Commissioner-elect.section 5324 of this title
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 92d of this title
Effective DateSection effective , see section 4 of act , set out as a note under .Jan. 3, 1935Aug. 21, 1935section 5324 of this title
